## Status

Completed **WK52 R13** as Agent 08: watch card chat defaults, compact layout when chat is off, LMB routing fix for chat toggles, **Enter Building â†’ `BuildingInteriorOverlay`** (pause/unpause, occupants list), screenshot scenario hook, tests, agent log, branch push, orchestrator receipt, and **PR #26**.

### What changed (high level)

- **`game/ui/hud.py`**: `_chat_visible` defaults **False**; `_just_pinned` forces collapsed chat; **`_desired_watch_card_expanded_h`** + **`WATCH_CARD_STATS_COMPACT_H`** so the card shell matches vitals when chat is closed; **`building_interior_overlay`** init/render/click routing; memorial-style fullscreen handling in **`virtual_pointer_in_hud_chrome`** (memorial visible + interior overlay).
- **`game/input_handler.py`**: **`chat_band_close` / `chat_band_open`** return early so clicks do not hit **`building_panel`**; **`enter_building`** shows overlay + **`apply_hud_pin_action("open_building_interior")`** (no deselect, no micro interior); paused LMB allowed for memorial **or** interior overlay; block world routing when interior overlay is visible.
- **`game/engine.py`**: **`open_building_interior`** / **`close_building_interior_unpause`** in **`apply_hud_pin_action`** (pause + hide overlay).
- **`game/engine_facades/render_coordinator.py`**: Skip generic â€śPAUSEDâ€ť scrim when interior overlay is visible (same pattern as memorial).
- **`game/ui/building_interior_overlay.py`**: New modal ( **`OVERLAY_ALPHA` = 180** like memorial), occupants from **`building.occupants`**, **Close** dismiss.
- **`tools/screenshot_scenarios.py`**: **`wk52_building_interior.png`** via **`_apply_building_interior`**; memorial shot kept.
- **`tests/`**: **`test_building_interior_overlay.py`**; **`test_wk52_watch_card`** adjusted for **`_just_pinned`** and **`WATCH_CARD_STATS_COMPACT_H`**.
